change_log_audit.interpretation: After adding BCR, DPS, and WYN, the corrected technical pilot roster passes the local 2018 change-log audit.

count_validation.expected_approx_range: about 500 securities; S&P 500 commonly has more than 500 tickers because some companies have multiple share classes

count_validation.note_after_historical_corrections: Future/current tickers in the user anchor were mapped to observed 2018-01-02 TAQ symbols where verified in raw Trade/NBBO files.

normalizations.META: FB for pre-2022 dates if encountered
normalizations.dot_or_slash_share_class: replaced with TAQ space convention, e.g. BRK.B -> BRK B

note: Use as technical preprocessing pilot anchor only. Prefer independently licensed point-in-time membership for final thesis sample.

point_in_time_corrections_applied.reason: These removals occur after 2018-01-02, so the removed securities should be present in a Jan-2 start roster.
